name: Spiced Applesauce Cookies
recipeInstructions: Cream the shortening. Gradually add the sugar, creaming until light. Beat in the egg. Sift together the dry ingredients and add alternately with the applesauce (be sure to use thick, unsweetened applesauce). Blend thoroughly. Drop by teaspoons onto greased cookie sheets about 2 inches apart. Bake in a preheated 350 degree oven for 10 minutes or until nicely browned. Remove from pan to cool. Makes about 3 dozen.
